principles: Native LlamaIndex retrievers (VectorContextRetriever via PropertyGraphIndex.as_retriever) — no custom BaseRetriever.
Only permitted customization: subclass a LlamaIndex class (Neo4jPropertyGraphStore.vector_query) so the native retriever sees our :Chunk embeddings.
Spike on the REAL graph before deleting the custom retriever or committing to rebuild.
Reuse the built graph + embeddings; treat Option 2 (rebuild) as the escalation if native expansion is unacceptable.
decision_pending: Option 1 (native retriever + store subclass, no rebuild) [recommended] vs Option 2 (rebuild to VectorStoreIndex + Neo4jVectorStore + AutoMergingRetriever). Tasks below assume Option 1; NLR-001 spike gates it.

tasks.title: SPIKE: native VectorContextRetriever over our chunks (store subclass) — judge quality
acceptance_criteria: Subclass Neo4jPropertyGraphStore.vector_query -> ema_chunk_embedding (:Chunk), returning LabelledNodes whose ids match graph node ids + scores
Stand up native VectorContextRetriever(graph_store=subclass, similarity_top_k, path_depth) via PropertyGraphIndex.as_retriever

Run >=3 real EMA queries on the built graph; record what comes back: relevance, provenance, whether small-to-big (PARENT_OF) + 1-hop links (LINKS_TO) context appears at a given path_depth, and latency
Written go/no-go in this work unit: proceed with Option 1, or escalate to Option 2

tasks.title: Wire the native retriever into the registry; delete HierarchicalPGRetriever
acceptance_criteria: build_hierarchical_retriever returns the native retriever (store subclass + VectorContextRetriever); profile maps to similarity_top_k/path_depth/limit
Custom HierarchicalPGRetriever removed; workflows unchanged (consume BaseRetriever.aretrieve())
Live: chat path returns relevant provenance-bearing results; ruff + indexing suite green

tasks.title: Update tests + docs to the native retriever
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_indexing_property_graph.py retriever tests target the native retriever (fake graph store)
docs/RETRIEVAL.md describes the native VectorContextRetriever + store subclass; no custom-Cypher-retriever claims
neo4j_hier.yaml retrieval block reflects the native knobs (similarity_top_k/path_depth/limit)

tasks.title: Query-cache hygiene (carry-over from WU-22)
acceptance_criteria: Clear the 15 stale pre-refactor query-cache entries
EMA_QUERY_CACHE_DISABLED=1 honoured in app.py so a fresh chat exercises the retriever (not cached old answers)

notes: If the user picks Option 2, replace NLR-002/003 with a rebuild plan (install llama-index-vector-stores-neo4j; re-index chunks to Neo4jVectorStore + docstore; AutoMergingRetriever + RecursiveRetriever). NLR-001 spike + NLR-004 stay either way.
